# mtncloud_monitoring_alert (Resource)

Manages an MTN Cloud monitoring alert: a notification rule that pages the listed contacts when a referenced check, group, or app (or all checks) crosses `min_severity`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# An alert that pages a contact when any check reaches critical severity.
resource "mtncloud_contact" "oncall" {
  name          = "on-call"
  email_address = "oncall@example.ng"
}

resource "mtncloud_monitoring_alert" "page_oncall" {
  name         = "page-on-call"
  all_checks   = true
  min_severity = "critical"
  contact_ids  = [tonumber(mtncloud_contact.oncall.id)]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the alert.

### Optional

- `all_checks` (Boolean) Apply the alert to all checks rather than an explicit list.
- `app_ids` (Set of Number) IDs of monitor apps this alert watches. Config-authoritative: managed here, not reconciled from the API.
- `check_ids` (Set of Number) IDs of checks this alert watches. Config-authoritative: managed here, not reconciled from the API.
- `contact_ids` (Set of Number) IDs of the contacts notified by this alert. Config-authoritative: managed here, not reconciled from the API.
- `group_ids` (Set of Number) IDs of check groups this alert watches. Config-authoritative: managed here, not reconciled from the API.
- `min_severity` (String) Minimum severity that triggers the alert (e.g. `info`, `warning`, `critical`).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the alert.
